name: Candy Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 Chocolate Candy Bars with Almonds -1.45 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate bars in a double boiler or microwave.
2. Quickly fold the melted chocolate into the whipped topping.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Garnish with shaved chocolate, if desired.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
